expectations.text: Should detect exactly 2 missing French keys: app.subtitle and messages.couldNotLoadResults
expectations.evidence: Agent detected both missing keys correctly

expectations.text: Should propose 2-3 translation suggestions for each missing key with explanations
expectations.evidence: Agent proposed 3 translation suggestions with detailed explanations for each

expectations.text: Should present suggestions one at a time and wait for user validation before proceeding
expectations.evidence: Agent presented first key interactively with 'Quelle traduction souhaitez-vous utiliser ?' prompt

expectations.text: Should correctly apply validated translations to fr.json file
expectations.evidence: Agent stopped after presenting first suggestion, did not complete the workflow (likely due to no user response in test)

expectations.text: Updated fr.json should maintain proper JSON structure
Should run verification again after updates to confirm all translations are now complete
expectations.evidence: Workflow did not complete to final verification step
